title: MS-18S/M/L Compressor Specifications
summary: Specifications for MS-18S, MS-18M, MS-18L including rotor diameters, displacement, motor power, oil charge, and weight.
evidence_quote:
型号 MS-18S MS-18M MS-18L
压缩机型号 半封闭单螺杆压缩机
螺杆转子直径 mm 181 181 181
星轮转子直径 mm 170 181 190
50Hz下的转速 rpm 2880
50Hz下的排气量 M3/hr 250.03 312.86 369.29
制冷剂 R22
容量控制 % 100-70-40-0（仅启动时）
喷液系统 喷油+喷液态冷媒
电机冷却系统 吸气态冷媒冷却
型式 3 相/2p 感应电动机
额定功率 kW 60 75 90 电机
启动方式 Y-△
牌号 SUNISO 4GS 润滑
油 加注量 L 12.0
油加热器 W 250
长 mm 1446 1476 1536
宽 mm 591 591 591 尺寸
高 mm 658 658 658
净重（不加油） Kg 760 800 870

title: Motor Internal Thermal Switch Settings
summary: Motor internal thermal switch opens at 105°C and closes at 88°C.
evidence_quote: 电机内部热动开关（开启：105℃，关闭：88℃）

title: Discharge Thermal Switch Settings
summary: Discharge thermal switch opens at 100°C and closes at 89°C.
evidence_quote: 排气热动开关（开启：100℃，关闭：89℃）

title: Capacity Control Operation Modes
summary: Capacity control modes: 100% (MV1-4 closed), 70% (MV3 open), 40% (MV2 open), start (MV1 open), stop (all closed).
evidence_quote:
电磁阀
负载MV1 MV2 MV3 MV4
100% 关 关 关 开
70% 关 关 开 开
40% 关 开 关 开
启 动 开关关 开
停 止 关关关 关

title: Maintenance and Inspection Schedule
summary: Inspection intervals: daily checks, every 3 years/20,000 hours internal inspection and oil change, every 7 years/40,000 hours compressor inspection.
evidence_quote:
每天检查 每天 操作内容
（1） 压力（排气和吸气）
（2） 油位（通过油视镜保证有油）
（3） 声音（是否有异常声音）
每 3 年 每 20，000 小时 压缩机内部检查
更换冷却油 检查周期
每 7 年 每 40，000 小时 检查压缩机

title: Cooling Oil Replacement Criteria
summary: Replace cooling oil if color, acid value, or water content is abnormal: color ASTM4 or lighter, acid value 0.05mgKOH/g or less, water 75ppm or less, or every 3 years/20,000 hours.
evidence_quote:
冷却油（SUNISO 4GS） 如果在颜色，酸值和水量上有不正常现象，更
换颜色：ASTM4或更浅
酸值：0.05mgKOH/g或更少
水量：75ppm或更少每 3 年间隔或20，000 运行小时

title: Oil Filter Differential Pressure Replacement Limit
summary: Replace built-in oil filter when differential pressure exceeds 1 kg/cm².
evidence_quote: 油过滤器（压缩机内置） 运行时有超过 1kg/cm2的不同压力，更换 需要时

title: Injection Line Filter Differential Pressure Replacement Limit
summary: Replace injection line filter when differential pressure exceeds 0.5 kg/cm².
evidence_quote: 喷液管道过滤器运行时有超过 0.5kg/cm2的不同压力时，更换

title: High Pressure Seal Clearance Specification
summary: High pressure seal clearance between main bearing housing and screw rotor should be 80-120 μm.
evidence_quote:
高压密封间隙
（主轴承箱与螺杆转子间的间隙）
间隙间隙 80~120μm

title: Screw Rotor Position Adjustment Specification
summary: Screw rotor relative position gauge dial reading should be -20 to +20 μm.
evidence_quote:
螺杆转子相对位置
机体上星轮安装孔中心螺杆槽
底圆中心 垫片
量规刻度盘读数 -20~+20μm

title: Edge Clearance Specification
summary: Edge clearance between body and star wheel should be 50-130 μm.
evidence_quote:
边缘间隙
（机体与星轮之间的
间隙）垫片
50~130μm

title: Motor Air Gap Specification for MS-18
summary: Motor air gap for MS-18 should be 1.26-1.54 mm.

title: Stator Coil Resistance Values for MS-18S/M/L
Insulation Resistance Minimum Value
summary: Stator insulation resistance must be 2 MΩ or more using a 500V DC megohmmeter.
evidence_quote:
使用DC500V高阻表来测试，确保其值为 2MΩ
或更多。

title: Gas Leak Test Pressure
summary: Pressurize compressor to 14 kg/cm²G with nitrogen after adding about 4 kg refrigerant for leak test.
evidence_quote:
在压缩机内充大约 4kg 制冷剂，加压氮气，使内压达到 14kg/cm
2G。

title: Oil Charge Volume
summary: Initial oil charge for MS-18S, 18M, 18L is 12 liters.
evidence_quote:
型号 填充量
MS-18S，18M，18L 12 L

title: Compressor Weight for Lifting
summary: Compressor weights: MS-18S 760 kg, MS-18M 800 kg, MS-18L 870 kg.
evidence_quote:
型号 重量（kg）
MS-18S 760
MS-18M 800
MS-18L 870

title: Oil Separator Weight
summary: Oil separator weight for MS-18S, 18M, 18L is 140 kg.
evidence_quote:
型号 油分离器重量
MS-18S,18M,18L 140kg

title: Motor End Cover Weight
summary: Motor end cover weight for MS-18S, 18M, 18L is 38 kg.
evidence_quote:
型号 重量
MS-18 S，18M，18L 38kg

title: Screw Rotor to Body Clearance Reference
summary: Reference clearance between screw rotor and body for MS-18 is 100-150 μm.

title: Star Wheel Thickness Reference for MS-18
summary: Star wheel reference thickness for MS-18 is 6.98-7.33 mm.
evidence_quote: 星轮参考厚度值 MS-18 6.98∼ 7.33

title: High Pressure Seal Clearance Adjustment Target
summary: Adjust high pressure seal clearance to 0.08-0.12 mm.
evidence_quote: 选择副垫片，使得高压密封间隙为0.08-0.12mm。

title: Edge Clearance Adjustment Target
summary: Edge clearance between star wheel plane and boss should be 0.05-0.13 mm.
evidence_quote: 用塞尺在排气和吸气侧测量星轮平面与凸台间的间隙， 间隙的变化在 0.05-0.13mm 之间。

title: Star Wheel to Carrier Clearance Limit
summary: Clearance between star wheel rotor and carrier surface must be 0.05 mm or less.
evidence_quote: 用塞尺测量其间隙，核实其为 0.05mm 或更少。

title: Bearing Inner Race Heating Temperature
summary: Heat bearing inner race to 110-130°C for shrink fitting.
evidence_quote:
加热内座圈的温度在 110-130℃，不要超过
此温度加热。

title: Screw Rotor Position Adjustment Target
summary: Adjust screw rotor position so dial gauge reads -20 to +20 μm.
evidence_quote:
选择主调节薄
垫片使刻度盘读数为-20～+20μm。

title: Screw Rotor Side Clearance Difference Limit
summary: If A and B side clearance difference is 15 μm or more, adjust until equal.
evidence_quote:
如果 A、B 两侧的间隙差异为 15μm 或更多，
松开固定法兰压盘（容量调节）与机体的螺栓，用塑料锤轻敲法兰压盘（容量调节） ，使
得左右的间隙彼此相等。

title: Lock Nut Tightening Torque for M10 and M12
summary: Tightening torque for lower nut M10: 400+50 kgf·cm, upper nut M10: 215+35 kgf·cm; M12 lower: 675+75, upper: 335+65.

title: Bolt Tightening Torque Table Excerpt
summary: Example torque: stator fixing bolt M6x20 120±20 kgf·cm, terminal block M10x40 600±40, rotor press plate M12x45 800±60.
evidence_quote:
1 固定定子/机体 六角螺栓M6X20 120±20 4
4 接线板/机体 六角螺栓M10X40 600±40 12
16 转子压盘/螺杆转子部件 六角螺栓 M1 2X45 800±60 1

title: Pump Down Stop Pressure
summary: Stop compressor when low pressure reaches 0.2 kg/cm²G or lower during pump down.
evidence_quote: 启动压缩机进行抽气,当低压变为 0.2kg/cm2G 或更低时，停止压缩机。

title: Oil Heater Power Rating
summary: Oil heater power is 250 W.
evidence_quote: 油加热器 W 250

title: Motor Rated Power for MS-18S/M/L
summary: Motor rated power: MS-18S 60 kW, MS-18M 75 kW, MS-18L 90 kW.
evidence_quote: 额定功率 kW 60 75 90 电机

title: Displacement at 50Hz for MS-18S/M/L
summary: Displacement at 50Hz: MS-18S 250.03 m³/hr, MS-18M 312.86 m³/hr, MS-18L 369.29 m³/hr.

title: Star Wheel Rotor Diameter for MS-18S/M/L
summary: Star wheel rotor diameter: MS-18S 170 mm, MS-18M 181 mm, MS-18L 190 mm.
evidence_quote: 星轮转子直径 mm 170 181 190

title: Screw Rotor Diameter
summary: Screw rotor diameter is 181 mm for all MS-18 models.
evidence_quote: 螺杆转子直径 mm 181 181 181

title: Compressor Dimensions for MS-18S/M/L
summary: Dimensions: MS-18S L1446xW591xH658 mm, MS-18M L1476xW591xH658 mm, MS-18L L1536xW591xH658 mm.

title: Motor Speed at 50Hz
summary: Motor speed at 50Hz is 2880 rpm.
evidence_quote: 50Hz下的转速 rpm 2880

title: Refrigerant Type
summary: Refrigerant used is R22.
evidence_quote: 制冷剂 R22

title: Capacity Control Steps
summary: Capacity control steps: 100-70-40-0% (0% only for start).

title: Lubrication Oil Type
summary: Lubrication oil brand is SUNISO 4GS.
evidence_quote: 牌号 SUNISO 4GS 润滑
